content.en:
The gods of the Pas Realm saw that the gods of the Netherfire Realm had already made a decision, so they didn't bother anymore.

After the Paz Realm God left, the Hellfire Realm God left here directly and went to the Terran Endless Realm Alliance.

When he was very close to the Endless Realm Alliance, he wore a full-body battle suit, which covered his entire body, covering his face and aura.

The suit he wears also belongs to the Supreme Realm soldiers, and it has the effect of hiding his identity.

This time, he was going to attack Ye Tian directly.

Ye Tian is very demonic, in case Ye Tian breaks through to the peak realm of gods in the future, it will bring a great enemy to the Huoyang True Sect.

Since there was already a contradiction between the two sides, he was ready to kill Ye Tian directly.

As for what the consequences will be if you kill Ye Tian?

He was the pinnacle of the realm god, and he hid his identity to attack and kill Ye Tian, and the realm court headquarters couldn't deduce it.

Besides, even if the show comes, he won't come to trouble him, and he will act as if he didn't find out what he did.

After all, as long as the Huoyang True Sect is not bad luck in the future, it will become a supreme force, no matter which top force it is, it doesn't want to offend the Huoyang True Sect.

Only 05 wants Ye Tian to die, then the human race will completely decline, and no one will care about a single human race.

This is also the reason why he dared to ignore the rules of the Realm Court Headquarters and directly assassinate Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian Realm God has multiple clones, I can't tell which one is the main body, but as long as he locks down all his parts and kills all of them, Ye Tian will naturally die. "

The god of the Underworld said secretly.

Moreover, he felt that the one located in the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance Terran Temple should be the main body, so he was going to go directly to the Terran Temple.

With his peak realm god cultivation, killing Ye Tian, a high-level realm god, should be a matter of instant killing.

However, he didn't know that Ye Tian had already fused the fragments of medium extradimensional things, and was able to use extradimensional things to stimulate the power of extradimensional things, and he also created two extradimensional techniques.

If he knew, he would definitely not attack and kill Ye Tian.

......

"There's a pinnacle realm god coming!"

Ye Tian was keenly aware of the arrival of the God of the Underworld Fire Realm.

If it were usual, he would not have noticed it.

But he had just offended the Huoyang True Sect, so he was naturally careful of the Huoyang True Sect's revenge, so several replica bodies had been spying into the void.

Because he fused extradimensional things, the combination of will and extradimensional power made the area of prying into a wider and more hidden.

This time, he sensed the arrival of the Underfire God, but the Underfire God had not yet noticed his prying eyes.

The god of the Hellfire Realm must not come to visit, and if he does, he will not sneak into the territory of the Endless Kingdom Alliance of the Terran Race, and the aura of convergence hides his body and his appearance.

He was a little far away from the Underworld Fire Realm God, and he couldn't be sure which of the two peak realm gods of this Fire Yang True Sect would have to be close to him and rely on his copying talent to be able to identify it.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled over and intercepted the other party.

He didn't want to put the battlefield in the Terran Temple, which would inevitably bring great damage to the Terrans.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian instantly intercepted the God of the Underworld Fire Realm, and the copy talent shrouded him, instantly confirming the identity of the God of the Underworld Realm.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God!"

The God of the Underworld Fire Realm was a little surprised, Ye Tian was able to detect his arrival and intercept him as soon as possible, which was very amazing.

But no matter how bad it was, he didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to block his attack.

He didn't think about it at all, and directly attacked Ye Tian with all his strength.

【Taixu Flame Gun】

This is the Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique of the God of the Underworld, and it is also his strongest killing move.

I have to say that the power of this move is very terrifying, enough to instantly kill a high-level peak realm god.

However, this extremely terrifying move, in Ye Tian's eyes, was just so-so.

"Celestial Scale Armor!"

"Extradimensional power!"

"Fusion!"

The Tianyan Scale Armor Technique, which is fused with the power of the extra-dimensional, is not as good as the extra-dimensional technique, but the defensive power is still extremely terrifying.

The Taixu Flame Spear attacked on the Tianyan Scale Armor Technique, only knocking Ye Tian away, but it did not hurt Ye Tian.

At this time.

The god of the Hellfire Realm was shocked.

"Extradimensional Power !!!!"

He wondered if he had seen it wrong, how could Ye Tian exert extradimensional power?

This point of extra-dimensional power could not have been comprehended by Ye Tian himself, it must have been the fusion of extra-dimensional things, but it was even more difficult for high-level realm gods to fuse extra-dimensional things, he had not succeeded so far, and even almost assimilated himself by extra-dimensional things several times.

And how could Ye Tian succeed in fusing extradimensional things!

The point is that Ye Tian's extradimensional power is somewhat familiar, too similar to the breath of the Kun Realm wood fragments.

How long has it been since the Kun Realm Wood Fragments appeared? In such a short period of time, Ye Tian has successfully fused?

No way!

He would rather suspect that he had sensed it wrong.

When the gods of the Underworld were stunned, Ye Tian was not idle, he directly urged the extra-dimensional technique-the extra-dimensional vine.

Airplanes!!!!!

The extradimensional vine seemed to extend from the extradimensional void and instantly wound towards the god of the Underworld Fire Realm.

"Extradimensional Arts!!!!"

The face of the god of the Underworld changed drastically, and the Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique of the Defensive Sect tried to resist the attack of the extradimensional vine.

However, the extradimensional vine contains the extradimensional power of a medium extradimensional thing, and its attack power is extremely terrifying.

Puff 543 Puff Puff!!!

All the defenses of the gods of the Underfire Realm have been breached.

Eventually, the extradimensional vine pierced one of the arms of the god of the Underworld, and the extradimensional power was still destroying within him.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian used a variety of methods, each of which contained extra-dimensional power, but so frequently urging super-dimensional power made the load on the body caused by the Kun Realm wood fragments also very large.

If you activate the power of the extradimensional force for a long time, the body will cause irreversible damage.

But Ye Tian was not afraid of physical damage at all, so he was frantically urging the extradimensional vine.

After a while, the god of the Hellfire Realm was finally completely bound by the extradimensional vine, making it impossible for him to escape.

"Ye Tianjie God spares my life, I am willing to hand over all the treasures, and make an oath so that the Huoyang True Sect will never trouble the human race again. "

The god of the Underworld was stunned and began to beg for mercy.

However, Ye Tian didn't care and continued to attack.

It didn't take long.

With the sound of screams, the body of the god of the Underworld was shattered by the extradimensional vine.

At this point, the peak realm god of the Netherfire Realm fell here.

"It seems that the extradimensional things I fused are not simple, otherwise the strength would not be above the level of starting to kill ordinary peak realm gods. Ye Tian thought to himself.
